optimization.summary: L-BFGS-B unconstrained Strong-Wolfe finite-difference probe scratch reuse

commands.parent_bench: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/projects/.rch-targets/frankenscipy-cod-b RUSTFLAGS='-C force-frame-pointers=yes' cargo bench -p fsci-opt --bench optimize_bench --profile release-perf -- lbfgsb --noplot
commands.candidate_bench: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/projects/.rch-targets/frankenscipy-cod-b RUSTFLAGS='-C force-frame-pointers=yes' cargo bench -p fsci-opt --bench optimize_bench --profile release-perf -- lbfgsb --noplot
commands.post_revert_bench: rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/projects/.rch-targets/frankenscipy-cod-b RUSTFLAGS='-C force-frame-pointers=yes' cargo bench -p fsci-opt --bench optimize_bench --profile release-perf -- lbfgsb --noplot

post_revert_current_vs_scipy.scipy_provenance: local Python 3, SciPy 1.17.1 / NumPy 2.4.3; rch exec declined the Python oracle as a non-compilation command

correctness_gates: PASS rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/projects/.rch-targets/frankenscipy-cod-b RUSTFLAGS='-C force-frame-pointers=yes' cargo check -p fsci-opt --all-targets
PASS rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/projects/.rch-targets/frankenscipy-cod-b RUSTFLAGS='-C force-frame-pointers=yes' cargo test -p fsci-opt lbfgsb -- --nocapture

PASS rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/projects/.rch-targets/frankenscipy-cod-b RUSTFLAGS='-C force-frame-pointers=yes' FSCI_REQUIRE_SCIPY_ORACLE=1 cargo test -p fsci-conformance --test diff_opt_lbfgsb_minimize -- --nocapture
PASS rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/projects/.rch-targets/frankenscipy-cod-b RUSTFLAGS='-C force-frame-pointers=yes' cargo clippy -p fsci-opt --all-targets -- -D warnings
